name: DefaultClosureRemarks
businessLogic: Read the current command payload (JSON string) from SlotsDTO using PMConstants.DOMAIN_CURRENT_COMMAND_PAYLOAD.

If featureType is 'AccountClosure', deserialize the payload into AccountClosureDTO. If closureRemarks is blank, retrieve ReferenceContractDTO from SlotsDTO using DDLCConstants.REFERENCE_CONTRACT_PARAMS. If the reference contract has a non-blank maturityDate, set closureRemarks to 'Deposit Account Closure'; otherwise set it to 'Operative Account Closure'. Serialize the updated DTO back and set it on SlotsDTO.

If featureType is 'TDAccountPreClosure', deserialize the payload into TDAccountPreClosureDTO. If closureRemarks is blank, set it to 'Deposit Account Closure'. Serialize the updated DTO back and set it on SlotsDTO.
If a JacksonException occurs during parsing, log the error and throw a RuntimeException.
